description_long: This is a rectangular, freestanding cabinet with a natural wood finish on the top, sides, and front. The front face features six distinct rectangular sections, likely representing drawers or cabinet doors, with a seamless, handle-less design for a modern aesthetic. The back of the cabinet is plain and unadorned, while the opposite side reveals a contrasting white panel with two open shelves in the center, flanked by two solid doors. The wood grain is visible throughout the exterior, giving it a warm and contemporary look suitable for urban interiors or semi-public spaces. The object appears sturdy and functional, designed to store or display items while maintaining a clean, minimalist appearance. Its size and construction suggest it could be used in lobbies, offices, or residential entryways.
description: A modern, rectangular wood cabinet with a seamless front and a contrasting white back featuring open shelves and doors. The design is minimalist, with visible wood grain and no external handles.
description_view_0: The side view shows a plain, vertical wood panel with no visible features or openings.
description_view_1: The front view displays six rectangular sections, likely drawers or doors, with a seamless, handle-less wood finish.
description_view_2: The opposite side view mirrors the first, showing a plain wood panel with no features.
description_view_3: The back view reveals a white panel with two open shelves in the center and two solid doors on either side.
